# Repository Information

## Repository Details

**Name:** Market Movers Pro
**URL:** https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers
**Owner:** MattGHicks

**License:** MIT

## Quick Links

- **Repository:** https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers
- **Issues:** https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers/issues
- **Clone URL (HTTPS):** `https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers.git`
- **Clone URL (SSH):** `git@github.com:MattGHicks/market-movers.git`

## Git Remote Configuration

This repository is configured with the following remote:

```bash
git remote add origin https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers.git
```

To verify your remote configuration:

```bash
git remote -v
```

Expected output:
```
origin  https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers.git (fetch)
origin  https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers.git (push)
```

## Branches

- **main** - Primary development branch (default)

## Collaboration

### Cloning the Repository

```bash
git clone https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers.git
cd market-movers
npm install
```

### Pushing Changes

```bash
git add .
git commit -m "Your commit message"
git push origin main
```

### Pulling Latest Changes

```bash
git pull origin main
```

## Repository Settings

- **Visibility:** Public
- **Default Branch:** main
- **Protected Branches:** None (currently)

## Contributing

This is a personal project. For suggestions or bug reports, please open an issue at:
https://github.com/MattGHicks/market-movers/issues
